title: The Programming Life
text: Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs!

title: API Endpoint
text: How many programmers does it take to change a light bulb? None, that's a hardware problem!

title: Database Humor
text: A SQL query walks into a bar, walks up to two tables and asks... 'Can I join you?'

title: Version Control
text: Git is a version control system. Git is also a joke control system. Every commit is a punchline!

title: React Reality
text: Why did React go to therapy? Because it had too many hooks!

title: Dumb Joke
text: What is the one thing grandmothers fall in love with. Staircases
